candidates.name: CellBinDB
candidates.license: CC0 for the Zenodo record; mixed_licenses.txt covers bundled public datasets
candidates.why: 1,044 annotated microscope images with semantic and instance masks; strong candidate for the first >=1k public direct-mask benchmark.
candidates.next_step: Download CellBinDB.zip, inspect image/mask layout, then generate a MorphoJet image table and a CellProfiler measurement-only oracle pipeline.

candidates.name: BBBC039 packaged in CellBinDB record
candidates.license: Check mixed_licenses.txt and original BBBC terms before public claims
candidates.why: Small direct-mask public corpus useful as a faster layout/prototype target before the full CellBinDB L3 run.
candidates.next_step: Use for loader development only; it is below the >=1k L3 scale gate.
